title: Implement a tiny event emitter
prompt: Create emitter.mjs exporting class Emitter with on(name, fn) (returns an unsubscribe function), off(name, fn), and emit(name, ...args) which calls listeners in order and returns how many were called.

grade.command: node -e "import('./emitter.mjs').then(m=>{const e=new m.Emitter();let got=[];const un=e.on('x',(v)=>got.push(v));e.on('x',(v)=>got.push(v*10));if(e.emit('x',2)!==2)throw new Error('count');un();if(e.emit('x',3)!==1)throw new Error('unsub');if(got.join(',')!=='2,20,30')throw new Error(got.join(','));console.log('ok')})"
